title: ICS / GEO Tools: Experiment 4/4B Metric Replay and GoalProgress Stress Benchmark
description: Evidence-bounded research software that exactly replays the stored CEI, CEI-4B, ranking, and aggregate metric layer of ICS v3 Experiments 4 and 4B and tests the GoalProgress repair in independent deterministic synthetic benchmarks. A preregistered reliability sweep preserves a failed zero-signal condition caused by correlated-feature leakage. The historical row generator is not included and is not claimed to have been reproduced.
